description: Booklet of Hebrew literary text. Almost all the pages contain some prior writing in Arabic script. Fol. 3v consists mostly of Arabic script including a basmala followed by "asmāʾ al-[...]." This page also contains the Hebrew name Yiṣḥaq b. Ghālib, possibly the same as the cantor who signs several legal documents in the early 12th century. The Arabic script document(s) here need further examination.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
